meanings.definition: people who are destined to die soon
examples: the agony of the doomed was in his voice

meanings.definition: fail to keep or to maintain; cease to have, either physically or in an abstract sense
examples: She lost her purse when she left it unattended on her seat

meanings.definition: fail to win
examples: We lost the battle but we won the war

meanings.definition: suffer the loss of a person through death or removal
examples: She lost her husband in the war
The couple that wanted to adopt the child lost her when the biological parents claimed her

meanings.definition: place (something) where one cannot find it again
miss from one's possessions; lose sight of
allow to go out of sight
examples: The detective lost the man he was shadowing after he had to stop at a red light

meanings.definition: fail to make money in a business; make a loss or fail to profit
examples: I lost thousands of dollars on that bad investment!
The company turned a loss after the first year

meanings.definition: fail to get or obtain
examples: I lost the opportunity to spend a year abroad

meanings.definition: retreat
fail to perceive or to catch with the senses or the mind
examples: We lost part of what he said

meanings.definition: be set at a disadvantage
examples: This author really suffers in translation

meanings.definition: no longer in your possession or control; unable to be found or recovered
having lost your bearings; confused as to time or place or personal identity
examples: I frequently find myself disoriented when I come up out of the subway
the anesthetic left her completely disoriented

meanings.definition: spiritually or physically doomed or destroyed
not gained or won
incapable of being recovered or regained
not caught with the senses or the mind
deeply absorbed in thought
examples: as distant and bemused as a professor listening to the prattling of his freshman class

meanings.definition: perplexed by many conflicting situations or statements; filled with bewilderment
examples: she felt lost on the first day of school

meanings.definition: unable to function; without help
